productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Brown Shoes
description: Style NoteColour block leather sneakers in coffee and chocolate brown in a neat, classic style. The label's standard styling on this off-duty sneaker a fresh twist away from the usual casual staples. The chocolaty leather upper puts this on top of out springtime wishlist! Product DetailsRound toed, casual sneaker in brown with lace ups and a pull tab at the heel collarLeather upper with reinforced overlays at the heel collar and midfootPadded collar and tongue and an ergonomically shaped insoleUpper adhered to the outsoleTPU outsole with patterned grooves (stitch detail on the heel of the outsole)Material and CareLeatherWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in sunlightUse a leather conditioner to polish the upper
